data.title: AlphaTON Capital sells iOx Therapeutics to Immunova through binding call option.
data.description: AlphaTON Capital has recently finalized a binding call option agreement to sell its legacy biotech asset, iOx Therapeutics, to Immunova. The deal involves a significant sum of money, with the exact amount remaining undisclosed. This transaction marks a key development in the biotech industry, as two prominent companies move forward with a strategic acquisition.

data.title: UNCG, SparkNC, & Guilford County Schools partner to prepare students for tech careers via SparkHub. Bridge between K-12, higher ed, & workforce.
data.description: The establishment of the innovative SparkHub at UNCG in Greensboro, North Carolina on February 17, 2026, marks a pioneering initiative to connect K-12 education, higher education, and the worldwide workforce. This collaborative effort involving SparkNC, UNC Greensboro, and other key stakeholders aims to address the transition challenges individuals face as they move between these educational and professional spheres. This unique platform is poised to have a significant impact by leveraging its influence on a broader scale, bringing together diverse sectors to collectively enhance educational and career opportunities.

data.title: Expert Naomi Bradbury Marchand explains health care directives in Arizona for deathcare decisions.
data.description: In Lake Havasu City, Arizona on February 17, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation discusses the designated individuals authorized to make decisions concerning deathcare in the state. The piece explores Arizona's regulations that dictate who holds the authority in such situations, aiming to prevent confusion among families. It outlines the specific guidelines that govern this process, ensuring clarity and compliance with state laws.

data.title: PenFed Credit Union opens new financial center in St. Thomas, U.S. Virgin Islands, offering great rates and service.
data.description: PenFed Credit Union, a leading federal credit union, has recently inaugurated a state-of-the-art financial center in St. Thomas. The center exemplifies PenFed's dedication to serving the residents by offering competitive rates and top-notch services. Celebrating the launch on Feb. 17, 2026, in Tyson, VA, PenFed is reaffirming its commitment to provide exceptional financial solutions for the community. This marks a significant milestone for PenFed as it continues to expand operations and cater to the needs of customers in St. Thomas.

data.title: Altai Resources Inc. (TSXV: ATI) to resume trading on TSXV on Feb 20, 2026, after a trading halt since Oct 10, 2025.
data.description: Altai Resources Inc. (TSXV: ATI) has announced that trading of its common shares will recommence on the TSX Venture Exchange around February 20, 2026. This decision comes after a trading halt was imposed on October 10, 2025, by the TSXV. The halt was initiated to allow for clarification regarding the Company's handling of the Malartic Exploration Gold Property and the Cessford Oil Wells Property, details of which were disclosed in news releases from August 27, 2025, and September 29, 2025, respectively.

data.title: Bluerock Homes Trust (BHM) plans to repurchase up to $10.0 million worth of its outstanding shares of Class A common stock.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. disclosed a new initiative to buy back $10.0 million worth of its Class A common stock shares as approved by its Board of Directors. The company, listed on NYSE American as BHM, is moving forward with this plan to enhance shareholder value.

data.title: Illumina (NASDAQ: ILMN) to participate in TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3, 2026.
data.description: Illumina, Inc. revealed today that its management team is set to take part in the TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference 2026 on March 3, 2026. This event will provide investors with insights into the company's future direction. Illumina, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol ILMN.

data.title: SerpApi sues SearchApi in U.S. District Court, alleging theft of proprietary tech. Feb 16, 2026.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on February 16, 2026, SerpApi initiated legal action in the U.S. District Court for the Western District of Texas against Zilvinas Kucinskas and his company, SearchApi. The lawsuit alleges that Kucinskas and SearchApi unlawfully appropriated SerpApi's advanced technology and confidential information to develop a competing product. This legal dispute centers on the accusation of intellectual property theft and infringement.

data.title: NAPA Anesthesia receives HITRUST r2 certification for cybersecurity of clinical and revenue cycle systems.
data.description: In Sunrise, Florida on February 17, 2026, North American Partners in Anesthesia (NAPA), a prominent anesthesia management company in North America, revealed that their clinical and revenue cycle systems achieved certified cybersecurity status from HITRUST. This certification signifies a strong focus on protecting data and ensuring privacy in the digital realm.
